branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v8.9 direction review and open the first External Runtime Outcome Evidence and Learning Loop implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v8.8 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v8.9 External Runtime Outcome Evidence and Learning Loop: connect approved/reproduced/rollback-ready external runtime actions to observed outcome evidence, acceptance or correction judgment, and learning-loop updates without claiming semantic or market truth from traceability alone.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v8.9 direction review and open the first External Runtime Outcome Evidence and Learning Loop implementation task.
